members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the left wall near the base of the stairs and above the baseboard
